news.headline: Hong Kong to open first convenience store operated by humanoid robot in AI push
news.summary:
Hong Kong will soon open its first convenience store operated by a humanoid robot as part of the city’s push to integrate AI into everyday life and deepen residents’ understanding of the technology, the finance chief has said.

news.headline: Hegseth attacks Europe over migration with beach 'invasion' D-Day speech
news.summary: The US defence secretary was speaking in Normandy, 82 years after allied forces launched their operation to liberate Nazi-occupied north-western Europe.

news.headline: Huge crowds throng Madrid streets for Pope's open-air Mass
news.summary: The pontiff waved at those gathered from his popemobile as he arrived at the Plaza de Cibeles.
